items.title: Effectiveness of an individualised swimming and education programme for chronic low back pain (EduSwim): a randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (n=?) compared an individualized swimming and education program (8 weeks via 4 telehealth PT sessions) with education alone for chronic low back pain, finding significant improvement in disability (RMDQ) at 8 weeks for the intervention group.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证实了在慢性下腰痛管理中，个性化游泳加健康教育的方案，通过远程物理治疗提供，能显著改善患者的残疾程度。这提示我们可以在远程康复中更积极地探索水上运动干预。
items.titleZh: 个体化游泳与教育项目对慢性下腰痛疗效的随机对照试验（EduSwim）
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验（n=?）比较了个性化游泳与教育项目（8周，通过4次远程物理治疗会话）与单纯教育对慢性下腰痛的疗效，发现干预组在8周时残疾程度（RMDQ）有显著改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms that an individualized swimming and education program, delivered via telehealth physical therapy, significantly improves disability in chronic low back pain. This suggests a more proactive exploration of aquatic exercise interventions in telerehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究的随访期较短（8周），长期效果尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: The study had a relatively short follow-up period (8 weeks), so long-term effects are not yet clear.

items.title: A systematic review of current evidence on clinical outcomes of lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques in sacroiliac joint dysfunction.
items.summary: This systematic review aims to evaluate the clinical efficacy of lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques for sacroiliac joint dysfunction (SIJD), searching studies published between January 2021 and December 2025.
items.curatedReason: 如果你在处理骶髂关节功能障碍（SIJD）患者，这份系统综述会帮你梳理腰椎滚动和改良 SIMS 手法治疗的现有证据，指导你未来临床决策。
items.titleZh: 腰椎滚动与改良SIMS手法治疗骶髂关节功能障碍临床结局的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述旨在评估腰椎滚动和改良SIMS手法治疗骶髂关节功能障碍（SIJD）的临床疗效，检索了2021年1月至2025年12月期间发表的研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you're treating patients with sacroiliac joint dysfunction (SIJD), this systematic review helps you synthesize current evidence on lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques, guiding your future clinical decisions.
items.limitation: 本系统综述注册在 PROSPERO，但目前尚未提供具体结果，无法评估其最终结论和潜在局限。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review is registered in PROSPERO but has not yet provided specific results, making it impossible to assess its ultimate conclusions and potential limitations.

items.title: In adult patients with brainstem strokes, does dysphagia rehabilitation improve health-related outcomes compared to usual care for inpatients? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis (12 studies, 443 participants) synthesized evidence on dysphagia rehabilitation for inpatients with brainstem stroke, categorizing interventions into traditional swallowing therapy or device inclusion, finding overall effectiveness.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析有力支持了脑干卒中住院患者吞咽康复的有效性。无论采用传统疗法还是包含器械的疗法，吞咽康复都应是这类患者早期管理的重要组成部分。
items.titleZh: 脑干卒中成人住院患者吞咽障碍康复是否改善健康相关结局：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析（12项研究，443名参与者）综合了脑干卒中住院患者吞咽障碍康复的证据，将干预措施分为传统吞咽疗法或包含器械的疗法，发现总体有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis strongly supports the effectiveness of dysphagia rehabilitation for inpatients with brainstem strokes. Whether traditional or device-assisted, dysphagia rehabilitation should be a crucial part of early management for these patients.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学异质性可能影响荟萃分析的整体结论强度。
items.limitationEn: Methodological heterogeneity among included studies might affect the overall strength of the meta-analysis's conclusions.

items.title: Responsiveness of the Arabic version of the lower extremity functional scale in individuals with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders.
items.summary: This observational study evaluated the responsiveness of the Arabic version of the Lower Extremity Functional Scale (LEFS) in 74 individuals with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders, finding its change scores correlated with other outcome measures.
items.curatedReason: 阿拉伯语版下肢功能量表（LEFS）表现出良好的反应性，支持其在阿拉伯语患者群体中作为物理治疗效果评估工具的有效性。
items.titleZh: 下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者阿拉伯语版下肢功能量表的反应性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项观察性研究评估了74名下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中阿拉伯语版下肢功能量表（LEFS）的反应性，发现其变化分数与其他结果测量指标相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Arabic version of the Lower Extremity Functional Scale (LEFS) demonstrated good responsiveness, supporting its validity as an outcome measure for physical therapy in Arabic-speaking populations.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，且样本量相对较小（74名参与者），可能限制了结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study with a relatively small sample size (74 participants), which may limit the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Examination and treatment of the spine for upper extremity pain: a case series.
items.summary: This case series describes three patients with upper extremity pain who showed clinically significant improvements in self-reported disability after receiving spine mobilization or manipulation techniques, even when symptoms didn't align with typical pain referral patterns.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例系列提示，即使上肢疼痛表现不符合典型脊柱放射模式，脊柱功能障碍仍可能是原发原因。对上肢疼痛患者进行全面的脊柱评估是有价值的。
items.titleZh: 上肢疼痛患者的脊柱检查与治疗：病例系列
items.summaryZh: 这个病例系列描述了三名上肢疼痛患者，他们在接受脊柱松动或手法治疗后，自我报告的残疾程度临床显著改善，即使症状不符合典型的疼痛放射模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case series suggests that even when upper extremity pain doesn't follow typical spinal referral patterns, spinal dysfunction can still be a primary source. A comprehensive spinal assessment for upper extremity pain patients is valuable.
items.limitation: 本研究为病例系列，证据等级较低，无法推断因果关系或普遍适用性。
items.limitationEn: This case series has a low level of evidence, making it impossible to infer causality or general applicability.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Authors' reply to: letter to the editor: occupational therapy at home E-rehabilitation (OTHER): a feasibility study of post-stroke intervention for transition to home.
items.summary: This article is an authors' reply to a letter to the editor regarding a feasibility study on occupational therapy at home E-rehabilitation for post-stroke patients transitioning home.
items.curatedReason: 这篇作者回复信件虽未提供新数据，但其上下文关注卒中后家庭康复的远程治疗可行性，提示 PT 行业对扩大远程医疗服务的兴趣和讨论。
items.titleZh: 作者回复：致编辑信函：居家职业治疗电子康复（OTHER）：卒中后居家过渡干预的可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 本文是作者对一封致编辑信函的回复，该信函涉及卒中后患者居家过渡的居家职业治疗电子康复可行性研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: While this author's reply doesn't provide new data, its context focusing on telerehabilitation feasibility for post-stroke home rehabilitation suggests ongoing PT industry interest and discussion in expanding telehealth services.

items.title: Virtual Reality-assisted Physiotherapeutic Training for Patients With Knee Osteoarthritis: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 5 RCTs found that virtual reality-assisted physiotherapy significantly improved pain (SMD = 0.40, 95% CI: 0.14-0.65, P = 0.002), physical function (SMD = 0.37, 95% CI: 0.05-0.70, P = 0.003), and balance (SMD = 0.44, 95% CI: 0.16-0.72, P = 0.002) in patients with knee osteoarthritis compared to traditional rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: VR 辅助的物理治疗对膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛、身体功能和平衡有显著改善作用。面对传统康复效果不佳的患者，你可以考虑将 VR 作为一种有效的辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实辅助物理治疗对膝骨关节炎患者的疗效：系统综述和 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 5 项随机对照试验的系统综述和 Meta 分析显示，与传统康复相比，虚拟现实辅助物理治疗能显著改善膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（SMD = 0.40, P = 0.002）、身体功能（SMD = 0.37, P = 0.003）和平衡（SMD = 0.44, P = 0.002）。
items.curatedReasonEn: VR-assisted physiotherapy significantly improves pain, physical function, and balance in patients with knee osteoarthritis. For patients where traditional rehabilitation is insufficient, consider VR as an effective adjunctive treatment.
items.limitation: 本系统综述仅纳入 5 项 RCT，样本量相对较小，可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review included only 5 RCTs, with a relatively small sample size, which may limit the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study.
items.summary: A U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study of 958 adults aged ≥55 years with stroke and MCI found that combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation significantly reduced the risk of developing post-stroke dementia compared with physical rehabilitation alone (HR = 0.70, 95% CI: 0.55-0.89).
items.curatedReason: 结合物理康复和认知康复能显著降低卒中后痴呆的风险。在为卒中患者制定康复计划时，你应积极考虑整合认知康复，特别是对于存在轻度认知障碍的患者。
items.titleZh: 物理与认知康复联合治疗与卒中后痴呆的相关性：一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究（纳入 958 名 55 岁以上患卒中和轻度认知障碍的成年人）发现，与单独物理康复相比，物理康复与认知康复相结合能显著降低卒中后痴呆的发生风险（HR = 0.70, 95% CI: 0.55-0.89）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation significantly reduces the risk of post-stroke dementia. When designing rehabilitation plans for stroke patients, you should actively consider integrating cognitive rehabilitation, especially for those with mild cognitive impairment.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在未测量的混杂因素，不能完全排除因果反转。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, unmeasured confounders may exist, and reverse causality cannot be entirely ruled out.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study

items.title: The Oxford visual perception screen detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors: an early cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study.
items.summary: A prospective cross-sectional study in three UK stroke rehabilitation units found that the Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors, showing good diagnostic accuracy compared to the Rivermead Perceptual Assessment Battery (RPAB).
items.curatedReason: 牛津视觉知觉筛查（OxVPS）在亚急性期卒中幸存者中能有效检测视觉知觉障碍。这为临床实践提供了一个早期筛查工具，有助于你及时识别并干预患者的视觉知觉问题。
items.titleZh: 牛津视觉知觉筛查在亚急性期成人卒中幸存者中检测视觉知觉障碍的早期横断面诊断准确性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在英国三家卒中康复机构进行的横断面研究发现，牛津视觉知觉筛查（OxVPS）能有效检测亚急性期成人卒中幸存者的视觉知觉障碍，与 Rivermead 知觉评估量表（RPAB）相比具有良好的诊断准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors. This provides an early screening tool for clinical practice, helping you timely identify and intervene in patients' visual perceptual issues.
items.limitation: 这是一项早期诊断准确性研究，需要更大规模和多中心验证以确认其广泛适用性。
items.limitationEn: This is an early diagnostic accuracy study that requires larger-scale and multi-center validation to confirm its widespread applicability.

items.title: The RESOLVE Trial: A Stepped-Wedge, Cluster-Randomized Clinical Trial Evaluating the Effects of Clinical Practice Guidelines and Psychologically Informed Physical Therapy on Low Back Pain Outcomes in Service Members and Veterans.
items.summary: A stepped-wedge, cluster-randomized trial in military and veteran healthcare settings found that a combined clinical practice guideline (CPG) and psychologically informed physical therapy (PIPT) implementation strategy significantly reduced LBP-related disability, pain, and downstream healthcare utilization.
items.curatedReason: 针对低级别腰痛，CPG 和 PIPT 结合实施策略显著改善了残疾和疼痛，并降低了下游医疗利用率。这对管理慢性腰痛的你来说，意味着应该积极整合心理知情物理治疗框架，并采用基于证据的主动和手法治疗。
items.titleZh: RESOLVE 试验：评估临床实践指南与心理知情物理治疗对军人与退伍军人腰痛结局影响的 stepped-wedge 整群随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对军人与退伍军人的 stepped-wedge 整群随机试验发现，结合临床实践指南（CPG）和心理知情物理治疗（PIPT）的实施策略显著降低了腰痛相关的残疾、疼痛，并减少了下游医疗服务利用。
items.curatedReasonEn: For low back pain, the combined CPG and PIPT implementation strategy significantly improved disability and pain, and reduced downstream healthcare utilization. This means you should actively integrate a psychologically informed physical therapy framework and employ evidence-based active and manual treatments in managing chronic LBP.
items.limitation: 本研究采用 stepped-wedge 随机试验设计，可能存在学习效应和时间偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This study used a stepped-wedge randomized trial design, which may introduce learning effects and temporal bias.

items.title: Measurement Characteristics and Clinical Utility of the 6-Minute Walk Test Among People with Stroke
items.summary: This study aims to evaluate the measurement characteristics and clinical utility of the 6-Minute Walk Test (6MWT) among people with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究将评估 6 分钟步行测试（6MWT）在卒中患者中的测量特性和临床实用性。作为卒中康复医师，你将能更好地理解和应用 6MWT，从而更准确地评估患者功能。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者 6 分钟步行测试的测量特性和临床实用性
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在评估 6 分钟步行测试（6MWT）在卒中患者中的测量特性和临床实用性。
items.curatedReasonEn: When assessing walking ability in stroke patients, the 6MWT is a common tool. This study will deeply evaluate its measurement characteristics and clinical utility, likely providing you with clearer guidance to interpret test results more precisely and optimize rehabilitation goal setting.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blinded, sham-controlled trial with 49 participants found that ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation applied to the radial nerve, combined with a 4-week exercise program, provided mid- and long-term benefits for chronic lateral elbow pain.
items.curatedReason: 超声引导下经皮电神经刺激联合运动治疗对慢性外侧肘部疼痛患者在中长期内有益。这提示你可以将此疗法作为辅助手段，帮助改善患者疼痛和功能，但并非独立疗法。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下经皮电神经刺激对慢性外侧肘部疼痛患者中长期益处：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 49 名慢性外侧肘部疼痛患者的随机、双盲、假对照试验发现，超声引导下经皮桡神经电刺激结合 4 周运动方案，在中长期内能带来益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: Ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation combined with exercise provides mid- and long-term benefits for patients with chronic lateral elbow pain. This suggests you can consider this therapy as an adjunct to improve patient pain and function, but not as a standalone treatment.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（49 例），可能限制结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (49 participants) may limit the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-center RCT in China with 54 post-stroke dysphagia patients found that intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding (IOE) for 14 days was superior to continuous nasogastric tube feeding (NG) in reducing reflux risk and supporting swallowing recovery.
items.curatedReason: 间歇性口食管管饲（IOE）在卒中后吞咽困难患者中可能比持续鼻胃管饲（NG）更能降低胃食管反流风险并促进吞咽恢复。你可以考虑 IOE 作为一种更优的营养支持方式。
items.titleZh: 间歇性口食管管饲与鼻胃管饲对卒中后吞咽困难患者胃动力、反流风险和临床疗效的多模式评估：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国大学附属医院进行的单中心随机对照试验（54 名卒中后吞咽困难患者）发现，间歇性口食管管饲（IOE）14 天在降低反流风险和促进吞咽恢复方面优于持续鼻胃管饲（NG）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding (IOE) may be more effective than continuous nasogastric tube feeding (NG) in reducing reflux risk and promoting swallowing recovery for post-stroke dysphagia patients. You can consider IOE as a superior method of nutritional support.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心试验，且样本量较小（54 人），结果的普遍性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center trial with a small sample size (54 participants), which may limit the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summary: A secondary data analysis from an RCT with 84 patients investigated adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, evaluating adherence to pain thresholds, exercise, and physiotherapy sessions.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了关于慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在运动干预中疼痛阈值依从性的数据。在制定康复计划时，你需要注意患者对疼痛阈值和治疗计划的依从性，这会影响长期效果。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动干预（包括疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗）的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 84 名慢性肩袖肌腱病患者进行的随机对照试验的二次数据分析，评估了患者在为期 26 周的运动干预中对两种疼痛阈值方案、运动和物理治疗的依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides data on pain threshold adherence in patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy during exercise intervention. When developing rehabilitation plans, you need to consider patient adherence to pain thresholds and treatment protocols, as this impacts long-term outcomes.
items.limitation: 该研究为二次数据分析，聚焦于依从性而非临床疗效，且样本量为 84 人。
items.limitationEn: This study is a secondary data analysis focusing on adherence rather than clinical efficacy, with a sample size of 84 participants.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: An economic evaluation alongside an RCT in Brazil with 145 participants (72 Pilates, 73 home-based exercises) found that a Pilates exercise program may be more cost-effective than home-based exercises for individuals with chronic non-specific low back pain from a healthcare and societal perspective.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，在巴西，普拉提对慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益可能优于家庭锻炼。在向患者推荐普拉提时，你可以此作为成本效益的参考，尤其是在资源受限的环境下。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益比较：一项基于试验的经济学评价
items.summaryZh: 一项在巴西进行的随机对照试验的经济学评价显示，从医疗和社会角度来看，普拉提运动方案对慢性非特异性腰痛患者的成本效益可能优于居家锻炼（共 145 名参与者，普拉提组 72 人，居家组 73 人）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that Pilates may be more cost-effective than home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain in Brazil. You can use this as a cost-effectiveness reference when recommending Pilates to patients, especially in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 研究仅在巴西进行，结果的普适性可能受地理和医疗系统差异影响。
items.limitationEn: Conducted only in Brazil, the generalizability of the results may be affected by geographical and healthcare system differences.

items.title: Correlation of Motor-Task Related Brain Activation Changes With Motor Performance Changes Induced by Constraint-Induced Therapy After Stroke.
items.summary: A study with 42 hemiparetic stroke participants undergoing CIMT during subacute and chronic periods evaluated changes in motor-task related brain activation using fMRI and their relationship to functional recovery assessed via the Wolf Motor Function Test (WMFT).
items.curatedReason: CIMT 确实能改善脑卒中患者的运动功能。这项包含 42 例亚急性和慢性期偏瘫卒中患者的研究提示，CIMT 引起的运动相关脑激活变化可能与其功能恢复有关。目前它仍是机制性研究，不会改变你的临床实践，但有助于我们深入理解 CIMT 的作用通路。
items.titleZh: 卒中后约束诱导疗法引起的运动任务相关脑激活变化与运动功能恢复的相关性
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 42 名偏瘫卒中患者在亚急性期和慢性期接受约束诱导疗法（CIMT）的研究，评估了运动任务相关脑激活变化与通过 Wolf 运动功能测试（WMFT）评估的功能恢复之间的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: CIMT demonstrably improves motor function in stroke patients. This study, involving 42 hemiparetic stroke participants in subacute and chronic phases, suggests that CIMT-induced changes in motor-task related brain activation may correlate with functional recovery. While mechanistic, this research won't change your clinical practice, but it deepens our understanding of CIMT's pathways.
items.limitation: 这是一项机制研究，结论不能直接推导为临床实践改变。
items.limitationEn: This is a mechanistic study, and its conclusions cannot be directly translated into changes in clinical practice.

items.title: Enhancing dynamic postural stability during gait in Parkinson's disease with textured insoles and auditory cue training: a randomized controlled trial study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 27 Parkinson's disease patients (Hoehn & Yahr stages 2.5-3) found that combining textured insoles with auditory cueing over 6 weeks enhanced dynamic postural stability during gait more than textured insoles alone or progressive walking training.
items.curatedReason: 对于帕金森病患者，结合纹理鞋垫和听觉提示的训练可能比单独使用纹理鞋垫或步行训练更能改善动态姿势稳定性和步态参数。你可以考虑将这种多感官整合方法引入患者步态康复方案。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者通过纹理鞋垫和听觉提示训练改善步态动态姿势稳定性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 27 名帕金森病患者（Hoehn & Yahr 2.5-3 期）的随机对照试验发现，为期 6 周的纹理鞋垫与听觉提示相结合的训练，比单独使用纹理鞋垫或渐进式步行训练更能提高步态期间的动态姿势稳定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: For Parkinson's disease patients, training combining textured insoles and auditory cues may improve dynamic postural stability and gait parameters more effectively than textured insoles or walking training alone. You can consider incorporating this multi-sensory integration approach into patient gait rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（27 人），且随访期较短（6 周），可能影响结果的可靠性和长期外推性。
items.limitationEn: The small sample size (27 participants) and short follow-up period (6 weeks) may affect the reliability and long-term generalizability of the results.

items.title: Exploring facilitators and barriers to health behaviors in stroke survivors: a multi-perspective qualitative study of patients, families, and healthcare professionals.
items.summary: A qualitative study in Shanghai, China, involving 17 stroke survivors, 10 family caregivers, and 11 healthcare professionals, explored facilitators and barriers to post-stroke health behaviors related to secondary prevention using the Adaptive Leadership Framework.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究提供了卒中幸存者及其家属和医疗专业人员对二级预防健康行为的促进因素和障碍的见解。这能帮助你更好地理解患者面临的挑战，从而设计更具针对性的康复计划。
items.titleZh: 探索卒中幸存者健康行为的促进因素和障碍：一项多视角定性研究（患者、家属和医疗专业人员）
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国上海进行的定性研究，通过访谈 17 名卒中幸存者、10 名家庭照护者和 11 名医疗专业人员，探讨了卒中后健康行为（与二级预防相关）的促进因素和障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study offers insights into facilitators and barriers to health behaviors for secondary prevention from the perspectives of stroke survivors, families, and healthcare professionals. This can help you better understand the challenges patients face and design more targeted rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果不具备量化和外推性，仅反映特定人群的经验。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study results are not quantifiable or generalizable, reflecting only the experiences of a specific population.

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review following PRISMA-ScR guidelines mapped and synthesized current evidence on transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) for stroke rehabilitation, focusing on study design, stimulation parameters, outcome measures, and reported effects, searching five databases up to December 2025.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了 tSCS 在卒中康复中的现有证据。尽管证据分散且质量不一，但它表明 tSCS 作为一个新兴的非侵入性神经调节手段，未来可能成为现有康复治疗的有效补充，值得我们继续关注其 RCTs 结果。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激用于卒中康复：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项遵循 PRISMA-ScR 指南的范围综述，通过检索五个数据库（截至 2025 年 12 月），绘制并综合了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）用于卒中康复的现有证据，重点关注研究设计、刺激参数、结局测量和报告效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review synthesizes current evidence on tSCS in stroke rehabilitation. While the evidence is fragmented and heterogeneous, it suggests that tSCS, as an emerging non-invasive neuromodulation approach, may complement existing rehabilitation therapies in the future. We should watch for upcoming RCT results.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估或荟萃分析，仅提供证据图谱，不能得出确切疗效结论。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews do not conduct quality assessments or meta-analyses, providing only an evidence map and not definitive efficacy conclusions.

items.title: Undernutrition is associated with higher rate of reamputation or survival, lower mobility and lower quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation: a longitudinal observational study
items.summary: A longitudinal observational study investigated the association between undernutrition and survival, reamputation-free survival, quality of life (QoL), wound healing, mobility, and work status post-dysvascular major lower limb amputation.
items.curatedReason: 营养不良与血管性主要下肢截肢术后更高的再截肢率或死亡率、更低的活动能力和更差的生活质量相关。这提醒你在处理此类患者时，必须重视营养评估和干预，将其作为康复计划的重要组成部分。
items.titleZh: 营养不良与血管性主要下肢截肢术后更高再截肢率或生存率、更低活动能力和更低生活质量相关：一项纵向观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项纵向观察性研究调查了营养不良与血管性主要下肢截肢术后生存率、无再截肢生存期、生活质量、伤口愈合、活动能力和工作状态之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Undernutrition is associated with a higher rate of reamputation or survival, lower mobility, and lower quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation. This reminds you that when treating such patients, nutritional assessment and intervention must be prioritized as a critical component of the rehabilitation plan.
items.limitation: 这是一项纵向观察性研究，只能表明相关性而非因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a longitudinal observational study, which can only indicate correlation, not causation.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Modified Ghost System combining action, observation, and vibration stimulation for recovery after distal radius fracture surgery: A single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol
items.summary: This study protocol describes a modified Ghost System, combining action observation and vibration stimulation for recovery after distal radius fracture surgery, replacing VR with iPad-based observation and a wristband vibrator. This single-arm feasibility trial will enroll 10 adults post-DRF fixation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究协议描述了一种改进的 Ghost 系统，结合动作观察和振动刺激，用于桡骨远端骨折术后康复。作为一种新颖的辅助工具，你可以关注其未来可行性研究结果，但目前仍是初步探索。
items.titleZh: 改进型 Ghost 系统结合动作观察和振动刺激促进桡骨远端骨折术后恢复：一项单臂临床可行性研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这项研究协议描述了一种改进型 Ghost 系统，结合动作观察和振动刺激，旨在促进桡骨远端骨折术后恢复，将 VR 头显替换为 iPad 观察和腕带式振动器。这项单臂可行性试验将招募 10 名桡骨远端骨折内固定术后成人。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol describes a modified Ghost system, combining action observation and vibration stimulation, for rehabilitation after distal radius fracture surgery. As a novel adjunct tool, you can follow its future feasibility study results, but it remains an initial exploration.
items.limitation: 这是一个单臂临床可行性研究协议，仅评估可行性，不提供疗效数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol, evaluating only feasibility and not providing efficacy data.

items.title: Eccentric cycling for ACL-R rehabilitation: A masterclass.
items.summary: This masterclass discusses eccentric cycling for ACL-R rehabilitation, noting that early progressive eccentric exercise, starting around three weeks post-operation in selected patients, shows potential benefits for quadriceps atrophy and strength deficits, also enhancing return-to-sport performance.
items.curatedReason: 离心骑行训练在 ACL-R 康复中越来越普遍，早期渐进性离心运动对股四头肌萎缩和力量不足可能带来益处。你可以将其作为一种早期且有效的力量训练手段，但需要注意个体化和循序渐进。
items.titleZh: ACL-R 康复中的离心骑行：大师课
items.summaryZh: 这篇大师课探讨了 ACL-R 康复中的离心骑行，指出早期渐进性离心运动（在选定患者中术后约三周开始）对股四头肌萎缩和力量不足显示出潜在益处，还能提高重返运动的表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: Eccentric cycling training is increasingly common in ACL-R rehabilitation, with early progressive eccentric exercise potentially benefiting quadriceps atrophy and strength deficits. You can consider it as an early and effective strength training method, but individualization and gradual progression are crucial.

items.titleZh: 运动中常见肩关节损伤的诊断、预防和治疗：丹麦运动物理治疗学会委托声明书的证据分级
items.summaryZh: 丹麦运动物理治疗学会委托声明书提供了运动中常见肩关节损伤的诊断、预防和治疗的证据分级。
items.curatedReasonEn: This statement from the Danish Society of Sports Physical Therapy offers graded evidence for the diagnosis, prevention, and treatment of common shoulder injuries in sport. It serves as a valuable clinical reference to guide your management of these injuries.
items.limitation: 本指南发表于2023年，部分证据可能需要随时间推移进行更新。
items.limitationEn: This guideline was published in 2023, and some evidence may need updating over time.

items.title: Exploratory Assessment of Robotic Ankle Foot Orthosis Stiffness and Neutral Angle on Stair Ambulation in Individuals with Cerebral Palsy
items.summary: An exploratory assessment investigated the effect of robotic ankle foot orthosis stiffness and neutral angle on stair ambulation in individuals with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 机器人踝足矫形器（AFO）的刚度和中立角度，会影响脑瘫患者的爬楼梯步态。在为脑瘫儿童选择和调整AFO时，务必考虑这些参数，以优化他们的移动功能。
items.titleZh: 机器人踝足矫形器刚度和中立角度对脑瘫患者爬楼梯步态影响的探索性评估
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性评估研究了机器人踝足矫形器刚度和中立角度对脑瘫患者爬楼梯步态的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: The stiffness and neutral angle of robotic ankle-foot orthoses (AFOs) impact stair ambulation in individuals with cerebral palsy. When selecting and adjusting AFOs for children with cerebral palsy, you must consider these parameters to optimize their mobility.
items.limitation: 本研究为探索性评估，需要更大规模的临床试验来验证其发现。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory assessment and requires larger clinical trials to validate its findings.

items.title: A nurse-led peer support program to address frailty in nursing homes: preliminary outcomes from a pilot pre-post study
items.summary: A pilot pre-post study evaluated the preliminary outcomes of a nurse-led peer support program incorporating structured motor-cognitive activities for frail nursing home residents.
items.curatedReason: 护士主导的同伴支持项目，通过运动认知活动改善养老院衰弱老人的状况，初步结果显示出积极潜力。这提示你可以探索多学科团队合作，将此类支持融入老年康复。
items.titleZh: 一项护士主导的同伴支持项目应对养老院衰弱老人的初步结果：一项试点前瞻性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项试点前瞻性研究评估了护士主导的同伴支持项目对养老院衰弱老人状况的初步改善结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Preliminary outcomes from a nurse-led peer support program, incorporating structured motor-cognitive activities to address frailty in nursing home residents, show positive potential. This suggests you can explore interdisciplinary collaboration to integrate such support into geriatric rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为试点性的前瞻性研究，样本量小，且为单中心研究。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot pre-post study with a small sample size and is a single-center study.

items.title: Frailty, physiological reserve, and surgical resilience: toward a dynamic stress–recovery model
items.summary: A review proposes a dynamic stress–recovery model linking frailty, physiological reserve, and surgical resilience to improve perioperative decision-making.
items.curatedReason: 衰弱、生理储备和手术复原力之间的动态应激-恢复模型，为老年患者围手术期评估提供了新视角。理解这些概念，能帮助你更精准地评估高龄患者的康复潜力。
items.titleZh: 衰弱、生理储备和手术复原力：迈向动态应激-恢复模型
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述提出了一个连接衰弱、生理储备和手术复原力的动态应激-恢复模型，旨在改善围手术期决策。
items.curatedReasonEn: The dynamic stress-recovery model linking frailty, physiological reserve, and surgical resilience offers a new framework for assessing perioperative risk and rehabilitation potential in older patients. Integrating these concepts into your assessments will help you manage elderly patients more precisely.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要为概念性模型，缺乏原始数据支持。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, primarily a conceptual model, lacking support from original data.

items.title: Characterization of orthogeriatric care models and association with mortality and health-economic outcomes in patients with hip fractures: a retrospective cohort study from Germany
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study from Germany characterized orthogeriatric care models and examined their association with mortality and health-economic outcomes in patients with hip fractures.
items.curatedReason: 德国骨科老年护理模型的分析显示，不同护理模式与髋部骨折患者的死亡率和经济结局存在关联。这提示我们，优化护理路径对改善老年髋部骨折患者的预后至关重要。
items.titleZh: 德国骨科老年护理模式的特征及其与髋部骨折患者死亡率和健康经济结局的关联：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项德国的回顾性队列研究描述了骨科老年护理模式的特征，并分析了它们与髋部骨折患者死亡率和健康经济结局的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analysis of orthogeriatric care models in Germany shows an association between different models and mortality and health-economic outcomes in hip fracture patients. This suggests that optimizing care pathways is crucial for improving prognoses in elderly hip fracture patients.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, which may have confounding factors and selection bias.

items.title: Virtual reality stimulation modulates saccular activity and vestibular system responses | European Archives of Oto-Rhino-Laryngology
items.summary: Virtual reality stimulation was found to modulate saccular activity and vestibular system responses.
items.curatedReason: 虚拟现实刺激能调节耳石囊活动和前庭系统反应，这为前庭康复提供了新的干预思路。你可以探索VR在评估和治疗前庭功能障碍中的潜力。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实刺激调节耳石囊活动和前庭系统反应
items.summaryZh: 虚拟现实刺激被发现可以调节耳石囊活动和前庭系统反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual reality stimulation can modulate saccular activity and vestibular system responses, offering new intervention approaches for vestibular rehabilitation. You can explore VR's potential in assessing and treating vestibular dysfunction.
items.limitation: 本研究的实验设计和受试者特征未在摘要中详细说明。
items.limitationEn: The experimental design and participant characteristics of this study are not detailed in the abstract.

items.title: Betulinic Acid Promotes Motor Function Recovery After Spinal Cord Injury by Inhibiting Apoptosis Through Myc/NF-κB Signaling Pathway
items.summary: Betulinic acid was found to promote motor function recovery after spinal cord injury by inhibiting apoptosis through the Myc/NF-κB signaling pathway.
items.curatedReason: 桦木酸通过抑制凋亡来促进脊髓损伤后的运动功能恢复。尽管是药理学研究，但理解其作用机制有助于你关注未来可能与物理治疗结合的神经保护策略。
items.titleZh: 桦木酸通过抑制Myc/NF-κB信号通路凋亡促进脊髓损伤后的运动功能恢复
items.summaryZh: 研究发现桦木酸通过抑制Myc/NF-κB信号通路凋亡，促进脊髓损伤后的运动功能恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: Betulinic Acid promotes motor function recovery after spinal cord injury by inhibiting apoptosis. Although a pharmacological study, understanding its mechanism of action helps you focus on neuroprotective strategies that may combine with physical therapy in the future.
items.limitation: 这项研究主要关注分子生物学机制，临床转化仍需大量工作。
items.limitationEn: This study primarily focuses on molecular biological mechanisms; significant work is still needed for clinical translation.

items.title: Changes in publicly insured general practitioner consultations before and after workplace injury: interrupted time series by consultation duration and care plans in Australia
items.summary: An interrupted time series study analyzed changes in publicly insured general practitioner consultations before and after workplace injury in Australia, focusing on consultation duration and care plans.
items.curatedReason: 澳大利亚工伤前后全科医生就诊模式的分析，有助于你理解公共保险体系下工伤患者的医疗利用趋势。这可能间接影响你管理工伤患者的转诊和康复计划。
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚工伤前后公共保险全科医生就诊变化：按就诊时长和护理计划划分的间断时间序列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项间断时间序列研究分析了澳大利亚工伤前后公共保险全科医生就诊的变化，重点关注了就诊时长和护理计划。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analysis of general practitioner consultation patterns before and after workplace injury in Australia helps you understand healthcare utilization trends for work-injured patients under public insurance. This may indirectly affect your referral and rehabilitation planning for work injury patients.
items.limitation: 该研究关注全科医生就诊，未直接涉及物理治疗服务的使用模式。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on general practitioner consultations and does not directly address the utilization patterns of physical therapy services.

items.title: O’Halloran Rehabilitation Monetizes Complex Care and Protects Revenue with WebPT SOAP 2.0
items.summary: O'Halloran Rehabilitation successfully leveraged WebPT SOAP 2.0 to manage complex care and protect revenue, demonstrating the benefits of specialized EMR systems for physical therapy practices.
items.curatedReason: 了解物理治疗 EMR 系统的市场应用案例，对你评估是否引入或优化现有系统有帮助。
items.titleZh: O’Halloran Rehabilitation 利用 WebPT SOAP 2.0 实现复杂护理变现并保护收入
items.summaryZh: O’Halloran Rehabilitation 成功利用 WebPT SOAP 2.0 系统管理复杂护理并保护收入，展示了专业 EMR 系统对物理治疗实践的益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding market use cases for physical therapy EMR systems can help you evaluate whether to adopt or optimize your current system.

items.title: Advancing spine connectomics and neural integration through machine learning and neuroengineering: a narrative review.
items.summary: A narrative review summarizes recent advances in spinal circuitry, emphasizing machine learning and neuroengineering, suggesting the spinal cord is an active system contributing to sensorimotor integration and adaptive motor control.
items.curatedReason: 我们是时候更新对脊髓的认知了：它绝不仅仅是反射弧的传导通路，而是一个主动参与感觉运动整合和适应性运动控制的复杂系统。未来脊髓损伤的康复干预，很可能会从靶向特定神经回路入手。
items.titleZh: 机器学习和神经工程推动脊柱连接组学和神经整合研究进展：叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇叙述性综述总结了脊髓回路研究的最新进展，重点介绍了机器学习和神经工程的应用，表明脊髓是一个积极参与感觉运动整合和适应性运动控制的系统。
items.curatedReasonEn: It's time to update our understanding of the spinal cord: it's far more than just a reflex arc conduit, actively engaging in sensorimotor integration and adaptive motor control. Future neurorehabilitation for spinal cord injuries will likely target specific neural circuits.
items.limitation: 这是一篇叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且未进行系统性证据评估。
items.limitationEn: As a narrative review, it may be subject to selection bias and does not involve systematic evidence appraisal.
items.journal: European spine journal : official publication of the European Spine Society, the European Spinal Deformity Society, and the European Section of the Cervical Spine Research Society

items.title: Factors Explaining Limited Daily Hand-use in Individuals with Fair-Good Motor Ability Post-Stroke.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study identified factors explaining limited daily hand-use in individuals post-stroke with fair-to-good motor ability, including proprioception, executive functions, and self-efficacy, beyond motor impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究提示，即便卒中患者上肢运动能力良好，其日常手部使用受限的原因可能超出运动障碍本身。它指出了本体感觉、执行功能和自我效能等因素的重要性，这有助于你进行更全面的评估和干预。
items.titleZh: 解释卒中后运动能力良好个体日常手部使用受限的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究发现，即使卒中后个体上肢运动能力良好，其日常手部使用受限的解释因素可能超出运动障碍，包括本体感觉、执行功能和自我效能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that even in stroke patients with fair-to-good upper extremity motor ability, limited daily hand use may stem from factors beyond motor impairment. It highlights the importance of proprioception, executive functions, and self-efficacy, which can aid in your comprehensive assessment and intervention planning.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法建立因果关系，且可能存在自我报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality and may be subject to self-report bias.

items.title: Lifestyle medicine innovations: Physical activity assessment in patient care and implementation of a digital health platform to support healthier movement.
items.summary: A narrative review introduces the ExerciseRxTM digital health platform as a scalable approach for personalized physical activity and home exercise support in clinical care, integrating physical activity vital signs.
items.curatedReason: ExerciseRxTM 平台提供了一个可参考的范例，说明如何将患者的身体活动视为“生命体征”之一，并将其整合到日常临床护理中。如果你正在探索数字化工具来优化患者居家锻炼和生活方式干预，可以关注其设计理念。
items.titleZh: 生活方式医学创新：患者护理中的身体活动评估及数字健康平台实施以支持更健康的运动
items.summaryZh: 一篇叙述性综述介绍了 ExerciseRxTM 数字健康平台，作为一种可扩展的方法，用于在临床护理中支持个性化身体活动和家庭锻炼，并整合了身体活动生命体征。
items.curatedReasonEn: The ExerciseRxTM platform offers a blueprint for treating physical activity as a 'vital sign' and integrating it into routine clinical care. If you're exploring digital tools to optimize patient home exercise and lifestyle interventions, pay attention to its design philosophy.
items.limitation: 这是一篇叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且对平台效果的报告处于早期研究阶段。
items.limitationEn: As a narrative review, it may be subject to selection bias, and the reported platform effects are in early research stages.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: Implementation of the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) bundled payment model in the US led to a significant decrease in the proportion of hospitals delivering prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement, with a difference-in-differences analysis showing a clear negative effect.
items.curatedReason: 美国捆绑支付模式（CJR）导致住院膝髋关节置换术前的康复（prehabilitation）服务提供显著下降。这直接影响了 PT 诊所的转诊和收入，促使你重新审视支付模式变化对服务结构的影响，并可能调整你的服务模式以适应政策。
items.titleZh: 强制捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务提供的影响
items.summaryZh: 美国强制性捆绑支付模式（CJR）实施后，下肢关节置换术前的康复服务提供比例显著下降，一项差异中的差异分析显示了明显的负面影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: The US bundled payment model (CJR) significantly decreased prehabilitation delivery for inpatient lower extremity joint replacement. This directly impacts PT clinics' referrals and revenue, urging you to re-evaluate how payment model changes affect service structures and potentially adjust your service delivery to adapt to policy shifts.
items.limitation: 本研究是观察性分析，无法确证捆绑支付是导致康复服务下降的唯一原因，且数据来源于Medicare，可能不完全适用于其他支付方。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, so it cannot definitively confirm that bundled payment is the sole cause of decreased rehabilitation services, and data is from Medicare, which may not fully apply to other payers.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Effects of multimodal balance training with and without auditory cues on balance, gait mobility, risk of fall and quality of life in patients with chronic stroke
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 42 chronic stroke survivors found that multimodal balance training combined with auditory cues may improve balance, gait mobility, fall risk, and quality of life more effectively than the same training without auditory cues.
items.curatedReason: 对于慢性卒中患者，多模式平衡训练结合听觉提示可能在改善平衡、步态移动、降低跌倒风险和生活质量方面比单纯训练更有效。这个小样本 RCT 提示了多感官整合在神经康复中的潜力，值得你在设计个性化训练方案时考虑。
items.titleZh: 多模式平衡训练结合/不结合听觉提示对慢性卒中患者平衡、步态移动、跌倒风险和生活质量的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 42 名慢性卒中幸存者的随机对照试验发现，结合听觉提示的多模式平衡训练在改善平衡、步态移动、跌倒风险和生活质量方面可能比不结合听觉提示的训练更有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic stroke patients, multimodal balance training with auditory cues may be more effective than training alone in improving balance, gait mobility, fall risk, and quality of life. This small-sample RCT suggests the potential of multisensory integration in neurorehabilitation, worth considering when designing personalized training programs.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（42 名参与者），且为单中心研究，结果的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (42 participants) and is single-center, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Beyond "Biomedical-Plus": Reclaiming the biopsychosocial model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy.
items.summary: This perspective piece argues that the biopsychosocial (BPS) model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy often defaults to a "biomedical-plus" approach, suggesting that deeper integration requires professional confidence, role clarity, and compassionate communication (the 3Cs).
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会模型（BPS）在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中的应用需要更深层次的整合，超越“生物医学+”模式。你需要通过增强职业自信、明确角色定位和运用同理心沟通，真正实践 BPS。
items.titleZh: 超越“生物医学+”：在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中回归生物心理社会模型
items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章指出，生物心理社会（BPS）模型在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中常沦为“生物医学+”模式，提出更深层次的整合需通过职业自信、角色清晰和同理心沟通（3C）来实现。
items.curatedReasonEn: The biopsychosocial (BPS) model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy needs deeper integration beyond a "biomedical-plus" approach. You need to genuinely practice BPS by enhancing professional confidence, clarifying your role, and employing compassionate communication.

items.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated combined biopsychosocial interventions for chronic low back pain, showing effectiveness in reducing pain and functional disability compared to usual care, waiting lists, or unimodal interventions.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析确立了联合生物心理社会干预对慢性腰痛的有效性。在临床实践中，你应该继续优先考虑结合运动疗法、疼痛教育和心理策略的多模式方法。
items.titleZh: 联合生物心理社会干预对慢性腰痛有效性的系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了联合生物心理社会干预对慢性腰痛的有效性，结果显示其在减轻疼痛和功能障碍方面优于常规护理、等待名单或单一模式干预。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis establishes the effectiveness of combined biopsychosocial interventions for chronic low back pain. In clinical practice, you should continue to prioritize multi-modal approaches combining exercise therapy, pain education, and psychological strategies.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告不同干预结构下效果的一致性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report the consistency of effects across different intervention structures.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials

items.title: Comparative efficacy of different joint mobilization techniques in shoulder adhesive capsulitis: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis compared the clinical effects of different non-thrust joint mobilization approaches for shoulder adhesive capsulitis, analyzing randomized controlled trials published between 2000 and 2025.
items.curatedReason: 对于肩关节粘连性囊炎，不同非推拿关节松动技术（non-thrust joint mobilization）的疗效比较有了新的系统综述和荟萃分析。这支持你在临床中根据患者情况和现有证据，更精准地选择和应用不同松动技术。
items.titleZh: 不同关节松动技术治疗肩关节粘连性囊炎的比较疗效：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析比较了不同非推拿关节松动技术治疗肩关节粘连性囊炎的临床效果，分析了 2000 年至 2025 年间发表的随机对照试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: For shoulder adhesive capsulitis, a new systematic review and meta-analysis compares the efficacy of different non-thrust joint mobilization techniques. This supports you in making more precise choices and applications of various mobilization techniques in clinical practice, based on patient condition and current evidence.
items.limitation: 研究未明确指出各技术间的显著疗效差异或最佳技术选择。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly highlight significant efficacy differences or optimal technique selection among the various techniques.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Outpatient rehabilitation can prevent suicide after acquired brain injury.
items.summary: A registry study of 591 patients with acquired brain injury found that outpatient rehabilitation can prevent suicide, showing a higher frequency of suicide after stroke and traumatic brain injury than in the general population.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，门诊康复可能降低获得性脑损伤（ABI）患者的自杀风险。这提醒你，作为康复专业人员，你在 ABI 患者管理中不仅仅是功能恢复者，更是整体心理健康和生命安全的守护者。
items.titleZh: 门诊康复可预防获得性脑损伤后的自杀
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 591 名获得性脑损伤患者的注册研究发现，门诊康复可以预防自杀，表明卒中和创伤性脑损伤后的自杀频率高于一般人群。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that outpatient rehabilitation may reduce suicide risk in patients with acquired brain injury (ABI). This reminds you, as a rehabilitation professional, that your role in ABI patient management extends beyond functional recovery to include safeguarding overall mental health and life safety.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性注册研究，可能存在未控制的混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective registry study, which may have uncontrolled confounding factors.

items.title: [Correspondence] From targets to minutes: making movement advice actionable
items.summary: This correspondence emphasizes shifting physical activity messaging from aspirational thresholds to achievable marginal gains, suggesting that small increases in activity among the least active yield the greatest population benefit, aligning with WHO guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这项评论强调了将体力活动建议从“目标”转向“分钟数”的实用性。在给患者提供运动建议时，你应侧重于鼓励微小但渐进的活动量增加，尤其对于活动量最低的人群，这能带来最大的群体健康效益。
items.titleZh: 从目标到分钟：让运动建议更具可操作性
items.summaryZh: 这篇通信强调将体力活动信息从宏伟目标转向可实现的微小增量，表明即便对最不活跃的人群，小幅活动量增加也能带来最大的群体效益，这与世卫组织指南相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the practicality of shifting physical activity advice from "targets" to "minutes." When providing exercise recommendations, you should focus on encouraging small but incremental increases in activity, especially for the least active individuals, as this yields the greatest population health benefits.

items.title: Exploring equity in telehealth interventions in physiotherapy: A meta-epidemiological study.
items.summary: A meta-epidemiological study assessed equity in physiotherapy telehealth interventions using the PROGRESS-Plus framework, including 94 telehealth equity trials, to understand factors influencing health outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 远程医疗的公平性不容忽视。这项荟萃流行病学研究（包含 94 项试验）运用 PROGRESS-Plus 框架评估物理治疗远程医疗，明确指出社会梯度对健康结局的影响。你在设计和推行远程医疗项目时，务必将公平性置于核心，确保覆盖面和可及性。
items.titleZh: 探讨物理治疗远程医疗干预中的公平性：一项荟萃流行病学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项荟萃流行病学研究利用 PROGRESS-Plus 框架评估了物理治疗远程医疗干预中的公平性，纳入 94 项远程医疗公平性试验，以理解影响健康结局的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Equity in telehealth is paramount. This meta-epidemiological study (94 trials) applying the PROGRESS-Plus framework to physiotherapy telehealth clearly shows the influence of social gradients on health outcomes. When designing and implementing telehealth programs, you must prioritize equity to ensure comprehensive coverage and accessibility.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的公平性评估结果或干预措施效果数据。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific equity assessment results or intervention effectiveness data.

items.title: Digital Addiction and Body Balance: An Investigation of Postural Stability in Young Adults: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 74 young adults (mean age 22.06 ± 6.66 years) found that digital addiction may impair postural balance, especially during attention-demanding tasks, highlighting the importance for physiotherapy.
items.curatedReason: 长时间使用数字设备可能影响年轻人的姿势平衡。评估患者的姿势稳定性时，需要考虑其数字设备使用习惯，尤其是在执行注意力任务时平衡控制的潜在改变。
items.titleZh: 数字成瘾与身体平衡：一项针对年轻人姿势稳定性的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 74 名年轻人（平均年龄 22.06 ± 6.66 岁）的横断面研究发现，数字成瘾可能损害姿势平衡，尤其是在执行注意力任务时，强调了这对物理治疗的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Prolonged digital device use may affect postural balance in young adults. When assessing patients' postural stability, consider their digital device habits, especially the potential changes in balance control during attention-demanding tasks.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Assessment and Management Practices for Post-Stroke Shoulder Pain Among Rehabilitation Professionals in Vietnam: A Cross-Sectional Survey.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey investigated the assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain among rehabilitation professionals in Vietnam, aiming to identify evidence-practice gaps and barriers to effective care.
items.curatedReason: 在管理卒中后肩痛时，不同地区和背景下的实践差异可能很大。这提醒你应关注并识别自身实践与循证指南之间的潜在差距，并探究影响有效护理的障碍。
items.titleZh: 越南康复专业人员卒中后肩痛评估与管理实践的横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面调查研究了越南康复专业人员在卒中后肩痛评估和管理方面的实践，旨在识别循证与实践之间的差距以及有效护理的障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Practices for managing post-stroke shoulder pain can vary significantly across regions and settings. This reminds you to identify potential gaps between your own practice and evidence-based guidelines, and to explore barriers to effective care.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，无法评估实践变化的趋势或干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey cannot assess trends in practice changes or the effectiveness of interventions.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: The Combined Use of Non-Invasive Neurostimulation with Interactive Digital Technologies in Spinal Cord Injury Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped the empirical evidence on the combined use of non-invasive neurostimulation with interactive digital technologies in spinal cord injury rehabilitation, identifying 494 unique records across seven databases.
items.curatedReason: 神经刺激与交互式数字技术结合用于脊髓损伤康复，这领域很新，但我们还没摸清全貌。这份范围综述（涵盖 494 份记录）提示该联合疗法有潜力，但在临床应用前，还需大量高质量研究来明确其有效性和最佳实践。
items.titleZh: 非侵入性神经刺激与交互式数字技术联合应用于脊髓损伤康复的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述绘制了非侵入性神经刺激与交互式数字技术联合应用于脊髓损伤康复的实证证据图谱，从七个数据库中识别出 494 条独立记录。
items.curatedReasonEn: The combination of neurostimulation and interactive digital technologies for spinal cord injury rehabilitation is a nascent field. This scoping review (494 records) suggests potential, but extensive high-quality research is still needed to establish efficacy and best practices before widespread clinical adoption.
items.limitation: 范围综述仅提供证据概览，不评估干预措施的疗效或安全性。
items.limitationEn: A scoping review only provides an overview of evidence and does not assess the efficacy or safety of interventions.

items.title: A scoping review of outcome and outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury.
items.summary: A scoping review synthesized outcome domains and measures from core outcome sets and standard outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury to support standardized outcome measurement in neurorehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 标准化结局测量是构建学习型健康系统不可或缺的一步。这份范围综述汇集了脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤的核心结局域和测量指标，你可以此为基础，在神经康复实践中推动跨疾病的评估统一化。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人结局及其测量集范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述综合了脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人核心结局集和标准结局测量集中的结局域和测量方法，以支持神经康复中的标准化结局测量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Standardized outcome measurement is a critical step for building learning health systems. This scoping review synthesizes core outcome domains and measures for spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury. Use this as a foundation to advocate for unified cross-condition assessments in your neurorehabilitation practice.
items.limitation: 范围综述只提供现有结局指标的概览，不评估其质量或在特定临床情境下的适用性。
items.limitationEn: A scoping review only provides an overview of existing outcome measures and does not assess their quality or applicability in specific clinical contexts.

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of eight physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain, highlighting the importance of facilitating well-being, embracing the body as a central starting point, and creating a safe alliance with the child.
items.curatedReason: 治疗脑瘫患儿疼痛的物理治疗师经验强调了建立安全、信任和尊重的联盟的重要性，同时要平衡缓解疼痛的责任与并非总是可能实现这一目标的现实。这提醒你，在处理儿科疼痛时，同理心和关系建立与身体治疗同等重要。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是帮助他们过上有意义的生活。” — 物理治疗师治疗脑瘫患儿疼痛的经验：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了八名物理治疗师治疗脑瘫患儿疼痛的经验，强调了促进福祉、将身体视为核心起点以及与患儿建立安全联盟的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physiotherapists' experiences treating pain in children with cerebral palsy highlight the importance of building alliances of safety, trust, and respect, while balancing the responsibility to alleviate pain with the reality that it's not always possible. This reminds you that empathy and relationship-building are as crucial as physical therapy when addressing pediatric pain.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（8名物理治疗师），结果的普遍性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size (8 physiotherapists), limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study (N=590) developed a machine learning model to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters, defining reduced exercise tolerance as peak oxygen uptake.
items.curatedReason: 术后早期预测心血管手术患者运动不耐受的能力，能够帮助你更早地识别高风险患者，并可能更积极地调整康复计划。注意研究在 3 个月后评估结局，这有助于你进行中期康复规划。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期运动不耐受
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究（N=590）开发了一个机器学习模型，利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后 3 个月时的运动能力下降，并将运动耐量下降定义为峰值摄氧量。
items.curatedReasonEn: The ability to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery (defined by peak oxygen uptake) using a machine learning model (N=590) is noteworthy. Early identification of high-risk patients allows for earlier intervention, but this is a retrospective cohort study; prospective RCTs are needed to validate its clinical utility.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和结果的外推性限制。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center retrospective cohort study, potentially subject to selection bias and limitations in generalizability.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: From mechanics to mobilization: a biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars
items.summary: A systematic review proposed a biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars, integrating strategies for both abdominal wall and uterine scars, addressing a lack of standardization in current approaches.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述为剖宫产相关瘢痕康复提供了一个基于生物力学信息的新框架，整合了浅层和深层瘢痕的康复策略。这提示你在评估和治疗剖宫产瘢痕时，需要超越传统表层处理，考虑更深层的生物力学影响。
items.titleZh: 从力学到动员：剖宫产相关瘢痕的生物力学康复框架：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述提出了一个基于生物力学信息的剖宫产相关瘢痕康复框架，整合了腹壁和子宫瘢痕的康复策略，以解决当前方法中缺乏标准化的不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review offers a new biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars, integrating strategies for both superficial and deep scars. This suggests that when evaluating and treating cesarean scars, you need to look beyond traditional superficial treatments and consider deeper biomechanical impacts.
items.limitation: 此为基于现有文献的框架性综述，缺乏统一的治疗方案和疗效对比数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a framework review based on existing literature, lacking standardized treatment protocols and comparative efficacy data.

items.title: Applications of ICF-Based Assessments and Interventions in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation: A Narrative Review.
items.summary: A narrative review identified 546 ICF-based assessments across 166 studies in post-stroke rehabilitation, demonstrating over 80% overlap with topics in the United Kingdom Stroke Guideline, primarily focusing on Body Function.
items.curatedReason: 本综述显示，ICF 框架在卒中康复评估和干预中应用广泛，且与英国卒中指南高度契合。虽然缺乏具体效应量，但其强调了将 ICF 作为临床实践和指南整合工具的价值。
items.titleZh: ICF 在卒中后康复评估与干预中的应用：叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一项叙述性综述发现，在 166 项研究中共有 546 种基于 ICF 的卒中后康复评估方法，与英国卒中指南的主题重叠超过 80%，主要侧重于身体功能层面。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review demonstrates the widespread application of the ICF framework in stroke rehabilitation assessment and interventions, showing high alignment with the UK Stroke Guideline. While lacking specific effect sizes, it highlights ICF's value as an integration tool for clinical practice and guidelines.
items.limitation: 本综述为叙述性综述，未能提供基于循证的 ICF 应用具体效果量。
items.limitationEn: This narrative review did not provide evidence-based effect sizes for ICF applications.

items.title: Kinesiotaping May Reduce Early Swelling After Knee Replacement, states study
items.summary: A randomized study of 136 patients found that adding kinesiotaping to standard rehabilitation after total knee arthroplasty reduced early postoperative knee swelling and led to a modest improvement in knee flexion.
items.curatedReason: 肌内效贴布（Kinesiotaping）辅助标准康复可能减少全膝关节置换术（TKA）早期肿胀并轻度改善屈膝活动度。这是一个低成本的辅助手段，但效应量有限，别期望它能彻底改变术后恢复，应作为短期支持性干预。
items.titleZh: 研究称肌内效贴布可减少膝关节置换术后早期肿胀
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 136 名患者的随机研究发现，在全膝关节置换术后标准康复中增加肌内效贴布治疗，可减少术后早期膝关节肿胀，并使膝关节屈曲度得到适度改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesiotaping as an adjunct to standard rehabilitation may reduce early swelling and modestly improve knee flexion after total knee arthroplasty (TKA). This is a low-cost adjunctive measure, but its effect size is limited; do not expect it to fundamentally alter postoperative recovery. It should be considered a short-term supportive intervention.
items.limitation: 研究强调需要进一步探究这些益处是否持续并改善以患者为中心的结局。
items.limitationEn: The study noted further research is needed to determine if these benefits persist and improve patient-centered outcomes.

items.title: Effects of square-step exercise on fear of falling in older patients with ischemic stroke: a cluster randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A cluster randomized controlled trial involving 62 older ischemic stroke patients found that square-step exercise improved fall fear, balance, and activities of daily living, and reduced fall risk.
items.curatedReason: 方步运动（square-step exercise）能有效降低老年缺血性卒中患者的跌倒恐惧。这个 RCT 证实了特定运动干预在改善心理结局方面的潜力，可作为神经康复中预防跌倒的补充手段。
items.titleZh: 方步运动对老年缺血性卒中患者跌倒恐惧的影响：一项集群随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 62 名老年缺血性卒中患者的集群随机对照试验发现，方步运动改善了跌倒恐惧、平衡能力和日常生活活动，并降低了跌倒风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Square-step exercise effectively reduces fear of falling in older patients with ischemic stroke. This RCT confirms the potential of specific exercise interventions in improving psychological outcomes and can be used as an adjunct to fall prevention in neurological rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（62 例），可能限制了结果的普遍性，且未报告长期随访数据。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (62 patients) may limit generalizability, and long-term follow-up data were not reported.

items.title: γ-transcranial alternating current stimulation improves upper-limb motor function in stroke patients and modulates oscillatory imbalance: a pilot randomized controlled trial | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A pilot randomized controlled trial demonstrated that γ-transcranial alternating current stimulation improved upper-limb motor function in stroke patients and modulated oscillatory imbalance.
items.curatedReason: 一项小型 RCT 显示，γ-经颅交流电刺激 (γ-tACS) 可改善卒中患者的上肢运动功能并调节皮层振荡失衡。这提示 tACS 可能成为神经调控干预的新方向，但鉴于样本量小，短期内别急于推广。
items.titleZh: γ-经颅交流电刺激改善卒中患者上肢运动功能并调节振荡失衡：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项试点随机对照试验显示，γ-经颅交流电刺激改善了卒中患者的上肢运动功能并调节了振荡失衡。
items.curatedReasonEn: A small RCT suggests that γ-transcranial alternating current stimulation (γ-tACS) may improve upper-limb motor function and modulate oscillatory imbalance in stroke patients. This indicates tACS could be a new direction for neuro-modulation interventions, but given the small sample size, do not rush to widespread adoption.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的试点 RCT，样本量小，需要更大规模的研究来验证其疗效和长期效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot RCT with a small sample size, requiring larger studies to validate its efficacy and long-term effects.

items.title: The effect of an eight-week FIFA 11+ program on the landing error scoring system following functional fatigue in adolescent female soccer players with dynamic knee valgus | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: An eight-week FIFA 11+ program significantly improved the Landing Error Scoring System (LESS) following functional fatigue in adolescent female soccer players with dynamic knee valgus.
items.curatedReason: FIFA 11+ 方案可改善青少年女性足球运动员在功能性疲劳后的着陆错误评分系统（LESS），这对于降低 ACL 损伤风险至关重要。将此方案纳入青少年女性运动员的训练常规，有助于提高预防效果。
items.titleZh: 八周 FIFA 11+ 方案对青少年女性足球运动员动态膝外翻功能性疲劳后着陆错误评分系统的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，为期八周的 FIFA 11+ 方案显著改善了青少年女性足球运动员在动态膝外翻和功能性疲劳后的着陆错误评分系统（LESS）表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: The FIFA 11+ program can improve the Landing Error Scoring System (LESS) after functional fatigue in adolescent female soccer players, which is crucial for reducing ACL injury risk. Incorporating this program into adolescent female athletes' training routines can enhance prevention effectiveness.
items.limitation: 研究虽然是随机对照试验，但只评估了 8 周干预的短期效果，缺乏长期随访数据来确认 ACL 损伤发生率的实际降低。
items.limitationEn: Although a randomized controlled trial, the study only evaluated the short-term effects of an 8-week intervention, lacking long-term follow-up data to confirm an actual reduction in ACL injury incidence.

items.title: Let's talk about sex (and gender) after ACL injury: a ...
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis from 2023 investigated sex and gender differences in self-reported activity and knee-related outcomes following anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤后的康复，性别差异确实存在。这项 2023 年的系统综述提示，你需要考虑这些差异，为不同性别的患者提供更个性化的康复目标和预期管理，因为他们在活动水平和膝关节结局上可能表现不同。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤后性别（sex and gender）对自我报告活动和膝关节相关结局的影响：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项 2023 年的系统综述和荟萃分析调查了前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤后，自我报告的活动和膝关节相关结局中的性别和社会性别差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sex differences in ACL recovery are real. This 2023 systematic review suggests you need to consider these variations to provide more personalized rehabilitation goals and expectation management for patients of different sexes, as they may show different activity levels and knee-related outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是自我报告结果，可能存在回忆偏差和主观性，且无法推断因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study focused on self-reported outcomes, which may be subject to recall bias and subjectivity, and causality cannot be inferred.

items.title: Action observation therapy in pediatric cerebral palsy: an fNIRS-based ...
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial investigated the effects of action observation therapy (AOT) on cortical responses and balance in pediatric cerebral palsy patients using fNIRS, finding improvements in balance.
items.curatedReason: 在小儿脑瘫患者的康复中，动作观察疗法（AOT）不只改善平衡，这项 RCT 还用 fNIRS 证实了它能调节皮层反应。这支持了 AOT 作为一种非侵入性神经康复手段，并可能为你开辟新的干预思路。
items.titleZh: 小儿脑瘫动作观察疗法：基于 fNNIRS 的皮层反应和平衡研究——一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验利用 fNIRS 研究了动作观察疗法（AOT）对小儿脑瘫患者皮层反应和平衡的影响，发现平衡有所改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: In pediatric cerebral palsy rehabilitation, Action Observation Therapy (AOT) doesn't just improve balance; this RCT, using fNIRS, confirms it also modulates cortical responses. This supports AOT as a non-invasive neurorehabilitation tool and may open new avenues for intervention.
items.limitation: 这项 RCT 是基于 fNIRS 的试点研究，样本量和随访时间有限，需要更大规模的研究来确证其长期临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This fNIRS-based pilot RCT has a limited sample size and follow-up period, and larger studies are needed to confirm its long-term clinical efficacy.

items.title: Handgrip and leg strength and risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged ≥ 80 years: a prospective HUNT study
items.summary: A prospective HUNT study found that handgrip and leg strength were associated with the risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged 80 years and older.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性 HUNT 研究发现，80 岁及以上老年人的握力和腿部力量与严重跌倒损伤风险相关。这强调了你作为物理治疗师，在对极高龄患者进行跌倒风险评估时，应高度关注这些基础力量指标。
items.titleZh: 80 岁及以上成年人握力和腿部力量与严重跌倒损伤风险：一项前瞻性 HUNT 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性 HUNT 研究发现，80 岁及以上成年人的握力和腿部力量与严重跌倒损伤风险相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective HUNT study found that handgrip and leg strength are associated with the risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged 80 years and older. This emphasizes that as a physical therapist, you should pay close attention to these basic strength indicators when assessing fall risk in very elderly patients.
items.limitation: 研究仅建立了力量与跌倒损伤风险的关联性，无法确立因果关系，也未直接评估干预措施的效果。
items.limitationEn: The study only established an association between strength and fall injury risk, without establishing causality or directly evaluating intervention effectiveness.

items.title: Associations of physical activity, pain intensity, and quality of life with work ability among Nigerian nurses with mechanical low back pain: a cross-sectional survey
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey in Nigeria explored associations of physical activity, pain intensity, and quality of life with work ability among nurses experiencing mechanical low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 尼日利亚护士的机械性下腰痛与身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量之间的关联提示，在职业健康干预中应关注这些因素，以提高工作能力。这为发展针对职业人群的康复方案提供了背景信息。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚机械性下腰痛护士的身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量与工作能力的相关性：横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 一项在尼日利亚进行的横断面调查探讨了患有机械性下腰痛的护士中，身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量与工作能力之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Associations between physical activity, pain intensity, and quality of life with work ability in Nigerian nurses with mechanical low back pain suggest these factors should be addressed in occupational health interventions to improve work ability. This provides context for developing rehabilitation programs for occupational populations.
items.limitation: 作为一项横断面研究，无法确立身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量与工作能力之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality between physical activity, pain intensity, quality of life, and work ability.
